notes: Solid snake implementation with wrap-around edges, speed progression, high score persistence, and pause support; minor visual simplicity (no grid lines, basic shapes) but fully functional and playable.
Excellent visual polish and core mechanics, but lacks an input queue for rapid cornering and will infinite loop if the player actually wins by filling the board.

A solid basic Snake with working movement, food, pause, wraparound, and scoring, but it is not flawless due to nonstandard start-on-space behavior, wraparound instead of wall death, and some gameplay/design simplifications.
